5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-777"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-777", "name": "Regular Expression without Anchors"}], "description": "Jupyter Server uses `re.match()` to validate the Origin header against the `allow_origin_pat` configuration.

Since `re.match()` only anchors at the start of the string, an attacker who controls a domain like `http://trusted.example.com.evil.com/` passes validation against a pattern intended to match only `trusted.example.com`.

### Impact

<=2.17.0

### Patches

057869a327c46730afede3eab0ca2d2e3e74acea, 49b34392feaa97735b3b777e3baf8f22f2a14ed8 

### Workarounds

Wrap your `allow_origin_pat` value with `^` and `$`

### References

https://github.com/jupyter-server/jupyter_server/pull/603
https://docs.python.org/3/library/re.html#re.fullmatch
https://docs.python.org/3/library/re.html#re.match", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-24qx-w28j-9m6p", "html_url": "https://github.com/jupyter-server/jupyter_server/security/advisories/GHSA-24qx-w28j-9m6p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-24qx-w28j-9m6p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40110"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-05T13:06:58Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/3519082?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Yann-P", "id": 3519082, "login": "Yann-P", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM1MTkwODI=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Yann-P", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "CORS Origin Validation Bypass via `re.match()` in `allow_origin_pat`", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T13:06:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jupyter-server/jupyter_server/security-advisories/GHSA-24qx-w28j-9m6p", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "jupyter-server"}, "patched_versions": "2.18.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<=2.17.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: CORS Origin Validation Bypass via `re.match()` in `allow_origin_pat`
